name: io.github.privacyplaybook/sops-mcp
description: MCP server for creating and managing SOPS-encrypted secret files. Generates secrets that the calling agent can never read back, derives values like Authelia PBKDF2 hashes, and tracks per-secret metadata so files can be rotated and audited without decryption.

environmentVariables.name: SOPS_MCP_AGE_PUBLIC_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Age recipient public key. Required at startup.

environmentVariables.name: SOPS_AGE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Age private key. Required at call time for any mutation tool (decrypt + re-encrypt). Read-only tools do not need it.

environmentVariables.name: SOPS_MCP_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the SSE transport. Required when SOPS_MCP_HOST is non-loopback (the server refuses to bind 0.0.0.0 without it).

environmentVariables.name: SOPS_MCP_ALLOWED_HOSTS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated Host-header allowlist for DNS-rebinding protection on the SSE transport. Defaults to loopback only.
